title: Improve queue
description: Bounded, human-curated list of candidate self-improvement items for improve.yml's fortnightly run. Deliberately not the AI job's own discretion to survey the repo and decide what's worth improving -- same reasoning as the analyst reading data/queue.json rather than freelancing what to write about. improve.yml picks exactly the oldest status=='open' item, never more than one per run, and never decides on its own to add new items to this file.
